offer: For freelancers using QuickBooks processing 5–15 transactions/month, manual categorization causes delays in financial reporting. We simplify expense categorization instead of manual expense tracking and reporting.
problem: Manual categorization of expenses is time-consuming and prone to errors.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for freelancers seeking help
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to freelancers with demo video
Community forums for freelancers sharing tools
try_it: Let users try monthly summary reports and adjust 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video of the manual-first workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
